{{Fig|Importing articles about the microbiology of gastroenteritis from [https://en.wikipedia.org Wikipedia] for [[incremental learning]]. In the picture, 7 have been found as already imported in the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] and marked as DUPLICATE!!!. One article about the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trigeminal_nerve trigeminal nerve] has been opened twice in Internet Explorer; it has been denoted as DOUBLED!!! for easy filtering. The articles will be imported into the Cranial nerve [[Glossary:Concept_group|concept group]] and their [[Glossary:Priority|priority]] will fall between 0.0068% and 0.0138%, and their corresponding Internet Explorer tabs closed upon the successful import.}}
